steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The question asks for the function of the underlined sentence in the text as a whole. The underlined sentence uses While to set up a contrast: horizontal gene transfer (HGT) is common among prokaryotes but has rarely been observed among eukaryotes. The task is to find which choice accurately describes what that sentence is doing.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — It contrasts the frequency with which a biological phenomenon has been detected in two categories of organisms.: The sentence contrasts how often HGT appears in prokaryotes versus eukaryotes — two categories of organisms. That is exactly what the sentence does. ✓
  • Choice B — It argues that two biological phenomena are more similar than they may initially appear to be.: The sentence is about one phenomenon (HGT), not two, and it highlights a difference, not a similarity. ✗
  • Choice C — It explains why a common perception of a biological process is flawed.: The sentence states a contrast in detection frequency; it does not address whether any perception is correct or flawed. ✗
  • Choice D — It indicates a distinction between the mechanics of two kinds of biological processes.: The sentence does not describe the mechanics of any process; the first sentence does that for vertical and horizontal gene transfer. ✗
That matches Choice A — It contrasts the frequency with which a biological phenomenon has been detected in two categories of organisms..
